words.meaning: to think of a new plan or method
words.example: Engineers devise a safer design for the bridge.

words.meaning: to begin or come from a particular place
words.example: The custom may originate in an old harvest festival.
The planner can envision a city with fewer cars.

words.meaning: to make something carefully and skillfully
words.example: She will craft a polite message to the customer.
Students construct a model to explain the system.

words.meaning: to include something as part of a whole
words.example: The teacher will incorporate news articles into the lesson.

words.meaning: to make something easier to understand or do
words.example: A diagram can simplify a difficult science idea.

words.meaning: to write a first version of something
words.example: She will draft a proposal before the meeting.

words.meaning: to change something for a particular person or purpose
words.example: The teacher can tailor the lesson to each class.

words.meaning: to create or express a plan or idea carefully
words.japaneseMeaning: 考案する、明確に述べる
words.example: The group will formulate a clear policy by Monday.
